evals.prompt: In my MatrixScan AR Android app I want to react when the user taps a highlight on a tracked barcode — log the barcode data when the highlight is tapped. Here is my Activity: IntegratedActivity.kt
evals.expected_output: The skill assigns a BarcodeArViewUiListener to barcodeArView.uiListener and implements onHighlightForBarcodeTapped to access the tapped barcode.

assertions.text: A BarcodeArViewUiListener is assigned to barcodeArView.uiListener
The barcode parameter of onHighlightForBarcodeTapped is used to read the tapped barcode data
Existing integration code (BarcodeAr, BarcodeArView, highlight provider) is preserved

evals.prompt: In my MatrixScan AR Android app I only want barcodes whose data starts with 'PROD-' to show highlights and annotations; everything else should be ignored. Here is my Activity: IntegratedActivity.kt
evals.expected_output: The skill implements a BarcodeArFilter whose filterBarcodes returns only the matching barcodes and registers it via barcodeAr.setBarcodeFilter(...).

assertions.text: A class implements the BarcodeArFilter interface
filterBarcodes returns the subset of barcodes whose data starts with PROD-
barcodeAr.setBarcodeFilter( is called with the filter
